region_tagging_notes: ICJ judge election file. Main scale is global/international-institutional; contents canvass Security Council members, Asia-Africa, Europe, Americas, and communist countries. Keep UN/ICJ/UNSC in organization_ids.
US politics file. Main geographic subject is United States/North America; contents include US-China, Korea, Pakistan, Iran-Iraq, Africa, UNGA, Nicaragua and El Salvador.
West German diplomacy file. Main subject is West Germany/Western Europe; contents also cover EC, France, UK, Italy, Spain, Eastern Europe, Asia, Latin America, Middle East, and Africa.
UN general file. UN itself belongs in organization_ids; geographic contents include China question, Asian chiefs-of-mission meeting, and African chiefs-of-mission meeting.
UN policy file centered on Asia, PRG, Vietnam, China, and ASEAN issues. Africa appears mainly as a cross-reference; do not make AFRICA a main region unless the Africa file content is incorporated.
